events.summary: D1 Phase 0 (Research) initialized. Research.md authored (12 sections, ~440 lines). 4 candidate sub-features enumerated: D1.a (time-decay + trend), D1.b (cohort priors), D1.c (AI-suggested replacement), D1.d (transparency UX). Recommended v1 pair: D1.a + D1.d (100% on-device, ~3.5 person-days, closes C5.b + C5.e out-of-scope). D1.b/c deferred to v8.0+. 3 new analytics events. Cross-platform tradeoff matrix documented. Phase E compliant. Phase 0 to Phase 1 GATED on operator picking 2 of D1.a/b/c/d.

Phase 0 (Research) approved (operator: 'continue with D1, C6 and C3'). Phase 1 PRD authored at docs/product/prd/adaptive-intelligence-next-pass.md (570 lines). LOCKED PAIR: D1.a (time-decay + trend detection) + D1.d (suppression transparency UX). 100% on-device, no backend touch, no DPIA delta. 6 FROZEN constants. 4 new home_ai_feedback_* analytics events. 6 success metrics T1/T2/T3 + 5 kill criteria + 6 OQ resolved. D1.b/c/e deferred to v8.0+. Estimated 2 new source files + 6 modified + ~600 LoC.

Phase 1 PRD approved (operator: 'continue d1'). Phase 2 Tasks at .claude/features/adaptive-intelligence-next-pass/tasks.md — 9 discrete tasks T1-T9 with dependency graph + LoC est ~835 total. 6-commit Phase 4 landing order: T1 analytics > T2 memory > T3+T4 detector+orchestrator > T5+T6 detail screen+routing > T7+T8 pbxproj+tests > T9 case-study. ~3.5h estimated. C5 dependency satisfied (RecommendationMemory + AIOrchestrator on main). Out-of-scope guards (3) explicit: D1.b cohort priors / D1.c LLM replacement / D1.e cross-segment correlation all deferred to v8.0+.
Phase 4 complete: T1-T9 shipped in 6 commits across single session. 21/21 D1 tests pass on iPhone 17 sim. State→testing. PR #576 ready for review.

Phase 9 CLOSED. PR #576 squashed onto main as ce50022 (operator-merged 2026-06-02 18:33Z). 5-file merge conflict resolved (pbxproj union + Package.resolved restore). state.json testing→review→merge→docs→complete. T+14d eval 2026-06-16. T+30d eval 2026-07-02.
